# Trustee Mrs. Goenka pls look into this matter #
Given priority only businessmen child.

itemReviewed.name: C P Goenka International School Pune - Wagholi

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Very bad and pathetic experience , we had when we went only for enquiry,  their is lot of discrimination and complicated procedure which was just shocking  .  My intention  to write this is so that others don't have to face such situation like us , the admission officer was rude , dint provide any information or bothered to show school even , but made us feel detailed enquiry form about us , parents info , when we ask question why so big form before admission, she got furious ,
told us you can not ask question about school workings, why are we asking questions , if we wanted answers early we should have come in December (we had gone in March and many other people also had come for enquiry )she gave expert opinion about us  and our child, and when we told her we dint like her behaviour, we would like to meet principal. she said she will not allow that , she is the only one we have to talk and she will contact us back , which she obviously din't do .
I only hope this is not how the school works it was just that lady , but i feel the school should know this so I am writting.
Choose the school only as last option and if you want admission plz, dont ask question otherwise you will be humiliated .
On our part we  were horrified and obviously din't want to send our child to such school where he was not welcomed , we went to other schools all of them were coordial and interested to show and talk about their school, we took admission in a good school with good attitude and respect for people my child is happy in the school .
Hope no one has to go through what we faced  . Thank you .

itemReviewed.name: C P Goenka International School Pune - Wagholi

itemListElement.reviewBody: Firstly for the support they provide to their student in every aspect in shaping their career. Secondly for the well organised classes, teachers and staff. Teachers always support to level up the performance.

itemReviewed.name: C P Goenka International School Pune - Wagholi

itemListElement.reviewBody:
People who stay in kharadi and Wagholi can think about this school.
- School ground is good but not that big so you can not expect like cricket match.
- Well maintained and clean.
- Infrastructure is good.
- They have CBSC till 7 and ICSC till 12 they have 30 student each class ( this they says. )
- Fees look little higer side. 1LKH +
Overall good school

Plz follow nd like.

itemReviewed.name: C P Goenka International School Pune - Wagholi

itemListElement.reviewBody: Good school with lot of facility and carting to IB curriculum. Principal ma'am, Teachers and other staff members are friendly and will greet and talk to you politely. Good experience doing a robotics session here.  Kudos to the team.
